column1: ___ played a joke on him. Do you know ___ who could do it?
"Can you tell me ___?" the teacher asked. But I didn't know ___ who could answer.
Shall we have ___ new in our class? A boy or a girl?
I haven't got ___ to look after. I have no sister or brother.
He is wearing ___ green. Is it a shamrock?
I would like ___ to eat and ___ to talk to.
I saw ___ bright in the tree. But my aunt said she didn't see ___. May be it was a leaf.
